scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/tui && npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/ai && npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/agent-core && npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/runtime && npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/coach-core && npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/claw && npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/coach-bot && npm run build --workspace @fitclaw/web-ui
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,runtime,coach-core,coding-agent,coach-bot,web-ui,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,blue,green,red,white,magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/ai" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/agent-core" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/runtime" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/coach-core" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/claw" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/coach-bot" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/web-ui" "npm run dev --workspace @fitclaw/tui"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "ai,web-ui" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd packages/ai && npm run dev:tsc" "cd packages/web-ui && npm run dev:tsc"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && npm run check:browser-smoke && cd packages/web-ui && npm run check
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
scripts.publish: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
